body_txt: Probably because they look cooler, these wings often appear demonic or bat-like. It might not always be clear if the wings turn into a cape or the cape turns into wings. It's best not to think about it. Some examples take this even further, making the cape a form of Morph Weapon , capable of turning into many different things. They may also function as a type of Wing Shield as a means to protect oneself or others. Compare Prehensile Hair .
